title: pseudophegopteris rectangularis
intro: Pseudophegopteris rectangularis, also known as a type of fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, with roots being used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the roots of Pseudophegopteris rectangularis are often dried and processed into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to support overall well-being.
